Our Process
3 Phases

The EMRG methodology.

We follow a rigorous three-phase system designed to eliminate technical debt and maximize revenue potential from day one.

01

Audit & Strategy

We take a deep dive into your current metrics, infrastructure, and user behavior to identify growth bottlenecks.

02

Design & Engineering

Our team builds high-performance storefronts and visual identities that resonate with your target audience.

03

Optimization & Growth

We continuously test, iterate, and refine every touchpoint to ensure maximum conversion and LTV.

Pricing
Tiered

Modular solutions.

Select your platform and choose a package that matches your current growth stage.

Starter

For emerging brands ready to establish a professional presence.

$4,500
2-3 Weeks
Custom Visual ID
Theme Setup
Basic SEO
Core Apps Setup

Growth

Engineered for brands scaling past $1M in annual revenue.

$8,500
4-6 Weeks
Everything in Starter
Custom UI Design
Advanced SEO
CRO Baseline Audit
Integrations

Scale

Enterprise-grade solutions for high-volume commerce engines.

$16k+
8-12 Weeks
Everything in Growth

Digital Marketing • 12/31/1969 • 5 min read

Digital Marketing in Latin America: Why Companies Waste Budget and How to Fix It

Digital marketing investment in Latin America is growing fast — but many companies still struggle to generate predictable ROI. The issue isn’t budget size, but strategy, tracking, and performance optimization.

Read More
Performance Marketing • 12/31/1969 • 5 min read

Why Customer Acquisition Costs Are Rising in Latin America

Customer acquisition costs (CAC) are increasing across Latin America due to competition, tracking limitations, and inefficient funnels. Here’s how companies can reduce CAC and scale sustainably.

Help

Common questions.

Can't find what you're looking for?
hello@emrg.studio

Project timelines vary depending on complexity. A starter Shopify setup takes 2-3 weeks, while a custom headless build can take 8-12 weeks.

We specialize in Shopify Plus and WooCommerce, but we have extensive experience with headless architectures using Next.js and Sanity.

Yes, we provide ongoing maintenance and growth retainers for brands that want to continuously optimize their performance.

Absolutely. We offer full brand identity services, from logo design and color palettes to voice and tone guidelines.

Let’s engineer your advantage.

We are currently accepting new projects for Q3 2026. Schedule a discovery call to discuss your goals and receive a custom roadmap.
